signal-agent.note: signal-agent uses Tier 3 Sonnet in production — wrapper available for lightweight subtasks only
signal-agent.compressed_context: For local Ollama runs (Tier 2 agentic loop): read /tmp/swarm-context/signals_compressed.json instead of brain/signals.json, /tmp/swarm-context/feedback_compressed.json instead of brain/feedback.json, /tmp/swarm-context/findings_compressed.json instead of brain/findings.json — pre-compressed versions updated before each agent run
